mapper.sql: A.BAT_MST_SEQ, A.LNK_SVC_MST_SEQ, A.SIF_ID, A.SSYSTEM_NM , A.STABLE_NM, A.SSCRIPT_PATH, A.SSCRIPT_NM, A.SINTERLOCK_PATH , A.SINTERLOCK_NM, A.SPROVIDER_SYS, A.SPERIOD, A.BATCH_SDT , A.LINKTYPE, A.SOPSTATE, A.SCOMMENT, A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID, A.DMODIFY_DT, A.SMODIFY_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM BIF.TB_BATCH_SVC_BAS A
AND A.SIF_ID LIKE '%' || #{sifId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND A.SSYSTEM_NM LIKE '%' || #{ssystemNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'

SELECT
FROM BIF.TB_BATCH_SVC_BAS A WHERE 1=1 AND A.SPERIOD IS NOT NULL AND A.SSCRIPT_NM IS NOT NULL AND A.SOPSTATE ='U'
